title: Ability to change a question type on a form
excerpt: The ability to change the question type when creating a form. For instance, if you’ve initially set a question as ‘Single Select’, you should be able to easily change it to ‘Multi Select’ or any other available question …

posts.author: DeborahKA (Deborah Cheal)
posts.cookedHtml: The ability to change the question type when creating a form. For instance, if you’ve initially set a question as ‘Single Select’, you should be able to easily change it to ‘Multi Select’ or any other available question type.
